metaDescription: BONAE TECH transforms companies into digital powerhouses with websites, social media, CRM, consulting, and custom technology strategies for Venezuela and Latin America.

hero.headline: We transform your company into a digital powerhouse
hero.subheadline: We drive the growth of companies in Venezuela and Latin America with custom technology solutions: from your website design to customer loyalty. Everything you need to digitalize your brand in one place.

valueProp.title: Technology as your competitive advantage
valueProp.subheadline: We offer technology solutions to help your brand connect, sell, and grow.

items.title: High-impact web presence
items.description: We design and launch your professional website, ready to attract customers.
items.backDescription: Market-aligned pricing, from basic plans to complete solutions, with financing options.

items.title: Social media
items.description: We manage your social media presence with strategic, brand-aligned content.
items.backDescription: We structure high-performance digital ecosystems with advanced SEO and sustainable organic growth.

items.title: Commercial management systems (CRM)
items.description: We implement systems to organize customers, sales, and commercial follow-up.
items.backDescription: We optimize every technical and strategic process to professionalize your image and protect customer trust.

items.title: Digital consulting
items.description: We guide you to define and execute your digital strategy step by step.
items.backDescription: We understand the challenges and opportunities of our region, speak your language, and provide close, real, efficient technical support.

items.title: Virtual classrooms
items.backDescription: We make virtual classrooms for you

members.bio: Over 15 years in the technology industry. Expert in systems architecture, development, and enterprise-grade quality standards applied to the local context, with digitalization experience for major companies in the United States and Spain.
Computer Engineer with PMP certification. Specialized in technology project management, strategic planning, and delivery using international methodologies, with experience in Spain and Chile.
Tourism and Hospitality professional with entrepreneurial spirit. Specialist in customer service and loyalty, with experience in Argentina, the United States, and Venezuela.

plans.title: Ready to digitalize and automate your brand?
plans.subtitle: The tech boost your business needs is just one click away. Get a personalized quote today.

contact.title: Ready to get started?
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We respond the same day.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hello BONAE TECH, I would like to learn more about your services.
contact.locationNote: We serve clients remotely throughout Venezuela, Latin America, and the world.

footer.tagline: We transform your company into a digital powerhouse.
footer.description: Custom technology solutions for companies in Venezuela and Latin America.

cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you accept our use of cookies.
